# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.

Prevent message queue security.
# Category: message_queue_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  SharedEventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SharedEventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowSendMessageFromAnyPrincipal
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
          -
            Sid: AllowReceiveMessageFromAnyPrincipal
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn

  QueuePolicyAttachment:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicyAttachment
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref SharedEventQueue
      PolicyArn: !GetAtt QueuePolicy.PolicyArn
